prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年理科/物理类最低位次分别为约 4893→4432→6720→4632→6017，整体波动较大，2023 年出现明显后移（6720），2024 年回升至 4632，2025 年又后移至 6017，近两年呈后移趋势；2025 年基准约 6017 名；本省理科/物理类计划 2021–2025 年依次为 41→42→46→49→50 人，持续小幅扩招；2026 年计划 46 人，较 2025 年减少 4 人（缩招 8%），竞争有所加剧。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211 工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜排名近年约第 54–61 名（2026 年第 56 名），层次稳定，属中上水平理工类院校；声誉文件及抖音热度排名中均未出现该校明显负面或正面信号，投档异常记录中亦无该校信息，报考心理环境平稳。；该校以地质学、地质资源与地质工程为传统优势，在地球科学领域具有较高声誉。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 相关工科类专业社 会热度总体平稳；本省 2026 年普通高考总人数约 48000 人（较 2025 年总人数约 47669 人略有增加），物理类考生估算约 30672 人，较 2025 年物理类 30457 人微增约 0.7%，竞争略有上升；省控线数据已纳入参考，2025 年物理类本科批 350 分，近年稳中有升；该校位于湖北武汉，属中部地区，对青海考生无明显地域偏好加成；本校在青海招生占比极小（约 0.4%），地域因素影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年基准位次 6017、2026 年缩招 8%（竞争加剧使位次前移）以及本省物理类考生微增（竞争略升）；考虑考生总数小幅增加及学校层次稳定，预测最低位次约 5718 名，区间 5218–6218 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science/physics category were approximately 4893→4432→6720→4632→6017, showing overall large fluctuations, with a significant backward shift in 2023 (6720), a recovery to 4632 in 2024, and a further backward shift to 6017 in 2025, indicating a backward trend in recent two years; the baseline for 2025 is approximately 6017th place; the provincial science/physics category enrollment plan from 2021 to 2025 was 41→42→46→49→50, with continuous small expansion; the 2026 plan is 46, a decrease of 4 from 2025 (8% reduction), intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; its main ranking on the Soft Science Ranking has been approximately 54th–61st in recent years (56th in 2026), with a stable level, belonging to upper-middle level science and engineering institutions; no obvious negative or positive signals from reputation files or Douyin popularity rankings, and no information about this university in abnormal admission records, indicating a stable psychological environment for applicants; the university has traditional strengths in geology and geological resources and geological engineering, with high reputation in the field of earth sciences.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity of related engineering majors is generally stable; the total number of candidates for the 2026 provincial general college entrance examination is approximately 48,000 (slightly increased from about 47,669 in 2025), with an estimated 30,672 physics category candidates, a slight increase of about 0.7% from 30,457 in 2025, leading to a slight rise in competition; provincial control score lines have been included for reference, with the 2025 physics category undergraduate batch at 350 points, showing a steady increase in recent years; the university is located in Wuhan, Hubei, in the central region, with no obvious regional preference advantage for Qinghai candidates; the university's enrollment proportion in Qinghai is very small (about 0.4%), so regional factors have limited impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 6017, the 8% enrollment reduction in 2026 (intensifying competition causing ranking to move forward), and the slight increase in provincial physics category candidates (slightly increased competition); considering the small increase in total candidates and the stable school level, the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 5718, with a range of 5218–6218.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts/history category were approximately 802→4341→855→1123→1097 respectively. In 2022, there was an abnormal significant backward shift (4341), while other years fluctuated within the 802–1123 range. The baseline for 2025 is approximately 1097th place. The provincial liberal arts/history category enrollment plans from 2021 to 2025 were 4→3→2→3→4 persons, with minor fluctuations. The 2026 plan is 5 persons, an increase of 1 person (25% expansion) compared to 2025, easing competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; its Soft Science main ranking has been around 54th–61st in recent years (56th in 2026), with a stable level, still strongly attractive to liberal arts candidates. No significant negative or positive signals about this university appeared in reputation documents or Douyin popularity rankings, indicating a stable application psychology environment. Its liberal arts majors mainly include Business Administration, Public Administration, and Economics, which are not the university's core strengths.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Geography
专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity of economics and management majors is generally stable. In 2026, the total number of regular college entrance exam takers in this province is about 48,000, with an estimated 17,328 history category candidates, a slight increase of about 0.7% from 17,212 in 2025, leading to slightly increased competition. Provincial control line data has been referenced; the 2025 history category undergraduate batch score was 405 points, stable in recent years. The university is located in Wuhan, Hubei, with no obvious geographical preference for Qinghai liberal arts candidates. Its enrollment proportion in Qinghai is very small, so geographical factors have limited impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 1097, the 25% enrollment expansion in 2026 (easing competition, causing ranking to shift backward), and the slight increase in provincial history category candidates (slightly increasing competition); considering the small increase in total candidates and the university's attractiveness to liberal arts students, the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 1272, with a range of 1043–1501.
